name: empire-core
description: SteelWolf Empire core utilities plugin per Claude (Code CLI + Cowork desktop + Web). Provides cross-workspace governance utilities: empire-quality (checklist pre-commit cross-repo Empire-wide, zero-regression rule, criteri di accettazione) + empire-pattern-detector (sistema rilevamento pattern v4.0 T1-T7, Pre-Mortem Q1-Q5 LL-Empire-004 gate, context-aware project detection, IronX firewall §11). Slash commands /empire-core:quality e /empire-core:detector. Pattern Anthropic 2026 native namespaced, dual skills+commands, schema-validated CI. Empire governance V1-V6 binding, LL-Empire 23+ lezioni binding, PROTOCOLLO GO non derogabile.
